issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing columns or mismatched data types.
The skill lacks runnable code snippets or concrete procedures, providing only high-level guidance.
The skill is specific to Python and scikit-learn, limiting its applicability to agents that can execute Python code.

scenarios.name: churn-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used ColumnTransformer + GradientBoostingClassifier with GridSearchCV and pickle; treatment chose HistGradientBoostingClassifier inside a Pipeline, tuned with RandomizedSearchCV + StratifiedKFold, reported with classification_report(), and serialized via joblib.dump().

scenarios.name: customer-segmentation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used KMeans with the elbow method and skipped pipelines; treatment built a Pipeline around StandardScaler + KMeans, selected k via silhouette score, applied PCA for visualization, and called out leakage prevention as the reason for the Pipeline.
